assessment_reasons: The compared previous export is an archived generated-cleanup OCR candidate export, not a current live export snapshot.
The net +16 consists of 19 added IDs and 3 removed IDs, so this is an actual regenerated candidate-set delta rather than ordering or record-count metadata only.

All 19 added IDs are from 33autumn25, where the previous archived question bank had empty mark_scheme_image_path and mapping_status=fail; the current question bank has mark-scheme paths and mapping_status=pass.
All added candidates remain blocked_until_reviewed/review-only; none are generation-ready.
Deleted storage-cleanup paths do not overlap current Content Lab source_artifact paths.

remaining_duplicate_groups.conclusion: Remaining duplicates are tiny, marked do not touch, and show 0 B reclaimable under the hard-delete policy; they were intentionally left untouched.

removed_candidates.likely_reason_no_longer_selected: current record is review-status only and mark-event confidence is below the 0.84 machine-candidate threshold after crop confidence/status downgrade
current record is review-status only and mark-event confidence is below the 0.84 machine-candidate threshold after crop confidence/status downgrade
current record is review-status only and mark-event confidence is below the 0.84 machine-candidate threshold after crop confidence/status downgrade

storage_cleanup_effect.conclusion: No evidence that storage cleanup caused a functional Content Lab export change; current candidate source artifacts resolve to canonical output paths and none were hard-deleted.

topic_routing_failures.compact_diagnosis: All 153 failures are provider/schema validation failures caused by evidence_used values that reference evidence not supplied in the routing packet. The errors are independent of storage cleanup and keep safe_for_strict_filters=false.
